description: 67 - 08-02-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson, Ailsa Terry (Private Secretary
text:
for Foreign Affairs, No.10) and others

From: Ailsa Terry Personal

Sent: Sat 08/02/2025 5:57:14 PM (UTC)

To: Peter Mandelson Personal Morgan
McSweeney Personal ; Matthew
Doyle Personal

Ce: Jon Garvie Personal : Jonathan Powell
Caroline Hurndalll Personal Ninieri
Pandit Personal ; Oliver Robbins

Subject: Re: *** commentary

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Peter,

Good to be connected. Copying a small number of colleagues at our end.

eK

Ailsa

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

From: Peter Mandelson
Sent: Saturday, February 8, 2025 3:49 pm
To: Morgan McSweeney ; Matthew Doyle
Cc: Ailsa Terry ; Jon Garvie
Subject: *** commentary

201

Peter

parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
